enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thalavali'?

'Thalavali' conveys a playful and energetic vibe, celebrating life and fun moments.

In which movie does 'Thalavali' appear?

The movie associated with 'Thalavali' is currently unknown.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Thalavali'?

The song is sung and composed by GV Prakash Kumar.

When was 'Thalavali' released?

'Thalavali' was released on April 10, 2024.
enrichedMetadata.summary: 'Thalavali' is an upbeat and energetic song that captures the essence of celebration and joy. The lyrics reflect a carefree attitude, encouraging listeners to embrace life with enthusiasm. GV Prakash Kumar's dynamic vocals paired with vibrant music create an infectious atmosphere that resonates with party vibes. This track is perfect for those looking to uplift their spirits and dance the night away.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thalavali Lyrics is an electrifying track that showcases GV Prakash Kumar's vibrant vocals and infectious energy. With lyrics penned by Vinnulaga Kavi, this song is sure to get you on your feet and dancing. Experience the unique blend of catchy beats and playful lyrics that make Thalavali a must-listen for any party playlist!
stanzaMeanings: You are the troublemaker, my life has become a mess because of you, everything I did has come out badly.
Oh, this troublesome life has changed, my eyes can't close and I can't sleep because of you.
Why have you come here and stopped? I believed everything you said, and now I'm stuck in this situation.
Every day, your troubles are no longer with me, you are the troublemaker, I have no feelings left, goodbye to you, troublemaker, troublemaker, troublemaker, troublemaker, troublemaker.
Life is beautiful, with cute little moments, it's fresh every day, but in reality, everything has gone away.
When I say something, it's the truth, there's nothing wrong with it, whatever is in my heart is what I say.
You are the reason for my troubles, my heart is in chaos, everything is because of you, my troublemaker.
Every day, your troubles are no longer with me, you are the troublemaker, I have no feelings left, goodbye to you, troublemaker, troublemaker.
In love, there are everyday problems, you are just a waste, only you give me tension, your life is a troublemaker for me.
You are my troublemaker, oh my troublemaker, everything is my fate, just like Tom and Jerry, you and I are not needed, you don't need me either.
Every day, your troubles are no longer with me, you are the troublemaker, I have no feelings left, goodbye to you, troublemaker.
You are the troublemaker, my life has become a mess because of you, everything I did has come out badly.
Every day, your troubles are no longer with me, you are the troublemaker, I have no feelings left, goodbye to you, troublemaker.
